character.name:
I want to create simple 2D sprite animatiom. Character is like astronaut in orange suit and blue helmet made of glass blue, and face is not visible, but siloute of face is. 

Animations I want some idle animation where he plays with his phone and just standing.
Also walking animation and running animation
